name: autouse
description: The most advanced computer use MCP — screen perception, browser control, coding, file management, and shell access in one package.
long_description:
Supports macOS and Windows.

**macOS** — On first run you will be prompted to enable Accessibility and Screen Recording services. Grant these permissions in System Settings > Privacy & Security so AutoUse can interact with your desktop.

**Windows** — Works out of the box. No extra permissions required.

AutoUse gives AI direct control of your computer. It connects any MCP-compatible client — Claude Desktop, Cursor, or any agent that speaks MCP — to your actual operating system. Your AI doesn't just talk about tasks. It performs them.

WHAT MAKES AUTOUSE DIFFERENT

**State-of-the-art Element Detection:** A proprietary screen analysis combining OCR and native platform accessibility APIs in a single unified pass. Full depth awareness — the AI knows exactly what's on screen, where it is, and how deep it sits in the UI hierarchy. Unlocks interaction with canvas-based and non-standard UI. Completes in seconds.

**Real Browser Control Without Debugging Mode:** Controls Chromium, non-Chromium, and every browser in between — Firefox, Arc, Brave, Safari, all of them. No debug flags, no DevTools Protocol, no separate browser instance, no additional connectors. Your real browser, your real sessions, your real logins.

**Full Codebase Editing from Chat:** Read, write, create, and modify files across large projects. Make direct changes and refactors in your actual codebase without switching to an IDE.

**Unified OS-level Capability:** Screen scanning, mouse and keyboard input, application launching, shell execution, file operations — all through a single MCP package. No juggling multiple tools.

KEY FEATURES

**Screen Perception:** OCR + native accessibility API detection combined. Structured element tree with full depth awareness.

**Click & Interact:** Pixel-perfect, context-aware interaction powered by word-level heat mapping.

**Type Anywhere:** Standard fields, canvas areas, or any app via native input APIs.

**Browser Control:** All browsers, no debugging mode, no connectors needed.

**Any Application:** Every app out of the box. No per-app connectors or adapters.

**Coding Tools:** Direct codebase access from chat. Read, write, modify across large projects.

**File Management:** Organize folders, restructure layouts, bulk rename — maintain your file system from chat.

**Shell Access:** Execute commands on the local machine.

**Session Intelligence:** Todo tracking, scratchpad memory, and session management for multi-step workflows.

PRIVACY

AutoUse does not collect any telemetry data. It does not read or transmit files from your machine. All data is processed locally and stays between your machine and the MCP client. Nothing leaves your computer.

tools.name: scan_screen
tools.description: Scan the current screen. Returns the element tree and an annotated screenshot with element IDs.

tools.name: wait
tools.description: Wait N seconds for UI to load.

tools.name: batch_actions
tools.description: Execute one or more actions sequentially in a single call. Supports clicks, typing, scrolling, shortcuts, app launching, AppleScript, shell commands, file editing, and session tracking.
